description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Commit that runs on every push. Use a matrix strategy to run two jobs: build on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8, and build_windows on windows-latest with Python 3.8. For each job, check out the code, set up the corresponding Python version, install pip, setuptools, and tox, and then run tox with specific options.
